title: Sheinbaum Delivers Historic Water Rights to Five Baja California Cities on World Water Day
detail: President Claudia Sheinbaum, via live link from Mexico City to Baja California, presided over a ceremony delivering historic water concession titles to five major municipalities — Tijuana, Rosarito, Mexicali, Tecate, and Ensenada — on World Water Day. The move, tied to Mexico's new National Water Law, guarantees water supply for the next 30 years without municipalities paying commercial third parties. Sheinbaum framed the reform as ending water privatization begun under President Carlos Salinas de Gortari in the early 1990s. The event underscored the government's push to assert public control over strategic resources as part of the Fourth Transformation agenda.
